reviews.title: Roma Hotel is a clean and excellent place in Sunset Town (but make sure you know about Sunset Town before your stay).
reviews.positives: Great view, nice and helpful staff, big and well appointed room, easy walk to fun things to do and restaurants, etc. The sunsets in ‘Sunset Town’ are truly legit and beautiful.
reviews.negatives: None of this a knock against Roma Hotel—which is very good! But, you should know about the location. Sunset Town is a unique place. It’s a planned/resort community that is a mix of very cool attractions like a nice beach, Kissing Bridge, an incredible stage with performances and a scenic gondola to an island with a theme/water park (which is worthwhile to spend a day). When we arrived we were in awe: “what a beautiful place!”—but after a few days, realize this is a place which has not sold probably 90% of the condo dwellings in this Italian-themed, sort of ‘fantasy’ community, with almost no permanent residents. It’s a little weird. A lot of empty businesses and unoccupied apartments with a smattering of successful restaurants and businesses. It seems the pandemic was very hard on this place. There is one major issue and that is the incessant 5-6-song playlist by Queen, ABBA, “we are the world”, etc. that was on a damn-near constant loop most of the day/night. It matches the awesome fireworks display at night, but OMG, it will drive you mad if you don’t leave the area once in awhile. We were there over Christmas so maybe it was different, but after a one week stay…we were ready to never hear those songs ever again!

reviews.title: The room price is a bit high.
reviews.text:
I checked in at 4:30 PM on September 1, 2024. The room rate during the holiday is 1,600,000 VND, which includes free cable car access. I booked directly on Agoda.
The room is a bit small. The hotel is located on a high cliff. Cars cannot stop in front of the hotel. Those who bring heavy suitcases have to carry them up the stairs as there is no ramp to roll the suitcase. 
Breakfast is served in portions, and it is somewhat acceptable.
The reception staff is enthusiastic. There is a male staff member who is both carrying luggage for guests and working as a bartender, so we had to wait a bit longer for assistance with our luggage because he was busy making drinks.
What I am most dissatisfied with at this hotel is that they did not inform customers about the need to check in before 4 PM to register for the free cable car ticket for the next day. There was not a single note about this on the booking. The hotel also did not contact me in advance to confirm this information. It feels like they intentionally make guests arrive late to cancel their free cable car ticket.
I checked in at 4:30 PM on September 1, 2023, and the receptionist informed me that the time to book the free cable car ticket for September 2 had already passed. They only offered me a ticket for September 3, but I will be checking out then and won't be able to use it. I chose this hotel because of the free cable car ticket, and now that I don’t have it, the room rate of 1.6 million VND for a normal quality room feels very expensive. I asked the receptionist why they didn't contact me earlier to inform me about the 4 PM deadline and the receptionist replied that they didn’t have any of my information (phone number or email) because I booked through another hotel called Olma Hotel and not directly through Roma.
OMG. That does not make sense at all! I booked through Agoda, I booked Roma Hotel and my information (email) is still displayed on Agoda, and even the hotel owner could message me through Agoda’s messaging system.
The hotel's explanation is unacceptable and is no different from intentionally preventing me from receiving the free cable car ticket. Everyone should note this detail when coming to Sunset City.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: It seems like a good location. It's not too noisy, close to the bridge, nice for taking the cable car, and it's good to go up towards Hilton. The hotel offers a free buggy tour, and the driver took really artistic photos with great care. There was a fixed pickup time from the airport, and there was a communication error, so we couldn't use the airport pickup service, but that seems to be an advantage too. The breakfast isn't extravagant, but compared to the large hotel we stayed at before, it was just enough to eat and fresh, which was nice. However, the staff wasn't very friendly, and although I requested a twin bed via email and received confirmation, they didn't prepare it as a twin. The room was also a bit dark. Additionally, it's best to prepare a shower filter for water. Those were the downsides. On the other hand, the hotel replies quite well to emails, which was nice. I would be willing to stay in a larger room next time.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Location is terrific. Take a room with sea view, preferably 4th floor (that's what we had)! You'll love it!
Staff is ready to fulfill any of your wishes if it is possible and will go an extra mile. Service is top notch. Our stay was very pleasant (Couple). Food and all the entertainment are right at the door step. Free cable car ticket and free water park ticket ! They have rooftop swimming pool couple streets away, it is still being built and a little under developed(March 2024), but great views from 16th floor, nice water temperature.
I liked everything about this place, you won't regret it.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Hotel stay
reviews.text:
Initially I was very upset as I missed the last Airport shuttle pickup (6 pm) upon arrival due to the long wait at the Immigration. The hotel stipulates only a 10-min wait for guests.  I managed to hire a taxi to hotel but I was dropped off at a long distance away from hotel due to a road closure for an event.
Subsequently, I met with a muddled- head lady Recepton who kept insisting I made my reservations thru’ Booking.com. I told her she  had it wrong and I showed her my Agoda reservations but she still insisted it was *** & say that Agoda must have relayed my reservations to *** to handle.  It was getting late, close to 8 pm and she was very insistent and doesn’t listen well. All these did not make a very good first impression of the hotel.

The hotel provides buggy service to Sunset Town which is commendable. The staff were helpful esp Mr Khanh with the exception of  my first encounter w the lady reception on the first nite. Overall, I enjoyed my stay and the hotel provides excellent breakfast.  Le Khanh is truly a professional and excellent  front desk staff which makes my stay a pleasant one. We were able to watch the fireworks display nightly at close range.
reviews.response:
Dear Cindy,
Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We sincerely regret the inconvenience you encountered upon arrival, especially with the airport transfer timing and the check-in confusion. Please accept our deepest apologies for the misunderstanding — this does not reflect the high standards of service we aim to provide.
We have discussed this issue with our front desk team and strengthened coordination between our booking channels to ensure smoother communication for all future guests. We’re very grateful that you still rated us positively despite the inconvenience.
We truly hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back to Roma Hotel Phu Quoc and provide a seamless, enjoyable stay next time.
Sincerely,
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team
reviews.room_type: Riva - Ocean View - 1 King Bed with Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Excellent staff, service, shower, beds, and sea view. All the amenities are brand new and in perfect condition. An absolutely Instagrammable location. Free cable car & waterpark tickets - totally worth the price. Free room upgrade and birthday decorations, plus complimentary fruit and nuts. Beautifully served (though not very nutritious) breakfast. A nice, clean beach is nearby, and there's also a free shuttle bus every 60 minutes to Khem Beach from a nearby square. The daily water show and the fireworks can be watched right from the room window. Outstanding!
reviews.negatives: Pillows are a bit too big and hard, so not very comfortable. All toiletries are provided, including conditioner, but shampoo is missing for some reason... More breakfast options and more than one drink (currently limited to either tea/coffee or just juice) would be nice. The description also mentions a swimming pool and a gym - no one has ever mentioned either of those at the hotel... Other than that, it's perfect. We'll definitely be back.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Superb room! Our kids loved it too! Beautiful layouts, design and theme! Great location with cable cars overhead. Great seaview. Able to watch fireworks every night! Room is clean too. Hotel staff was really helpful and kind.

We're glad you were able to enjoy the nightly fireworks from your room. It's great to know that you found the room clean and our staff helpful and kind. We look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit!

Sincerely,  
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: การจัดการในบางจุดค่อนข้างแย่
reviews.text:
ค่าที่พัก ทุกๆ 1,000 บาท (650,000VND) จะได้ตั๋ว cable car ไป sunworld hon thom ฟรี 1 ใบ (เราได้มา 4 ใบ) โดยเข้าเช็คอิน 26 Sep และเราตั้งใจจะได้ใช้ตั๋วในวันที่เช็คอิน แต่ปรากฎว่า พนง.แจ้งว่า ใช้ได้ในวันถัดไปเท่านั้น (แต่เช้าวันถัดไปเราต้องกลับแล้ว) ซึ่งพนง.แจ้งว่า ส่งอีเมลล์มาแจ้งเงื่อนไขนี้แล้ว OMG !!!! ส่งเมลล์มาตอน 20:30 ของวันที่ 25 Sep 😱😱😱 ใครมันจะแก้ไขอะไรได้ทันล่ะ และที่สำคัญคือ !!!! เราทักแชทคุยกับที่พักตอนก่อนคอนเฟิร์มการจอง สอบถามเรื่องตั๋วนี้ แต่ทางพนง.ไม่ได้แจ้งเงื่อนไขนี้ให้เราเลย

เสียความรู้สึกมาก กับการบริหารจัดการเงื่อนไขแบบนี้

ไหนจะเรื่องอาหารเช้า สั่งอย่าง ได้อย่าง
reviews.response:
เรียนคุณเSUNANTA ,

ขอขอบคุณที่แบ่งปันความคิดเห็นเกี่ยวกับการเข้าพักของท่าน เราต้องขออภัยอย่างยิ่งที่เงื่อนไขการใช้ตั๋ว **cable car** ไม่ได้เป็นไปตามที่ท่านคาดหวัง ทางเราขออภัยที่แจ้งข้อมูลเรื่องนี้ล่าช้าและไม่ได้สื่อสารให้ชัดเจนก่อนการจอง เราเข้าใจดีว่าการได้รับอีเมลแจ้งเตือนในเวลาที่ไม่เหมาะสมส่งผลให้ท่านไม่สามารถใช้บริการตามที่ตั้งใจได้ และสิ่งนี้สร้างความไม่พอใจให้กับท่าน ซึ่งเราขอรับผิดชอบและขออภัยในความไม่สะดวกที่เกิดขึ้น

ในส่วนของอาหารเช้าที่ไม่ตรงตามคำสั่งซื้อ เราขออภัยอีกครั้งสำหรับข้อผิดพลาดนี้ และจะดำเนินการตรวจสอบเพื่อปรับปรุงการบริการในอนาคต

เราหวังว่าจะมีโอกาสได้ต้อนรับท่านอีกครั้ง เพื่อมอบประสบการณ์ที่ดียิ่งขึ้น

reviews.title: Last-Minute Stay in Sunset Town – Small but Cozy
reviews.text:
Booked Roma Hotel in Phu Quoc on a total whim – I was in love with Sunset Town and just wanted to stay the night there. Most hotels were full that day, and this one popped up with availability, so I went for it.

Arrived late at night and left the next afternoon – super short stay, but it did the job. The hotel is small, rooms are compact, but if you're in Phu Quoc to explore and just need a place to sleep, this works perfectly. The room was clean, cozy, and comfortable enough for a quick night’s rest.

The free airport shuttle and Sunset Town tour option are solid perks. For budget or last-minute travelers, that’s a win.

It’s not fancy, it’s not big, but it’s practical and well-located – especially if you’re focused on being out and about. For what I needed that night, it was spot on.
reviews.response:
Dear Akshay,
Thank you so much for choosing Roma Hotel Phu Quoc and for taking the time to share your thoughtful review.
We’re glad to hear that our hotel provided a convenient and comfortable stop during your spontaneous visit to Sunset Town. It's great that you found our free airport shuttle and tour options helpful, and that the clean and cozy room suited your needs.
We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to welcome you back for a longer stay in the future.

Sincerely,
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.text:
Pros: Worth the money for staying here. you will get free cable car’s ticket and free buggy service within the town. 
Cons: sometimes, the staff would missed out your message to get the free buggy service way to return to the hotel.
 Swimming pool closed at 7pm but, when we reached at 530pm, they not allow us to go in already. 
Beware of the driver that arranged by the hotel!!!! We booked a driver to sent us to another hotel which located at the North island, when we on the way to the hotel, the driver offer us free tour to stop by some famous places including King Kong mart, A-C noodles and the beachside without any charges. We agreed the offer by the driver, So while on the way to the beachside, the driver want to drop us to a PEARL FARM (souvenir shop), so that he could earn some reward from the factory. We rejected the offer and he was a little frustrated with us. That made us insecure because we’re travelled with my baby. Luckily, he still dropped us to the hotel and we paid 500K DONG + tips. I know this is not the hotel’s problem, but guys, beware of the drive that offer free tour.
reviews.response:
Dear Toh,  

Thank you for your detailed review and for sharing your experience at Roma Hotel Phu Quoc.  

We’re glad to hear that you found your stay worth the money and enjoyed the complimentary cable car tickets and buggy service. However, we apologize for any inconvenience caused by missed buggy service messages and the early closure of the swimming pool. Your feedback helps us improve, and we will address these issues promptly.  

Regarding the driver, we’d like to clarify that the taxi to the other hotel was an external service arranged by us. We will follow up with our partner to ensure such situations are avoided in the future and provide a better experience for our guests.  

We appreciate your understanding and hope to welcome you back for an even better stay in the future.  

Sincerely,  
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

L’accès à la piscine avec un chauffeur pour vous y emmener! (C’est dans un autre bâtiment)

La gentillesse du personnel!
Le restaurant-bar de l’hôtel est super aussi ! De très bons smoothies et jus !
Cet endroit a beaucoup de potentiel!
L’hôtel est très bien placé que ce soit pour aller voir le feu d’artifice le soir, aller au câble car, visiter la ville. Tout est super !

reviews.title: Fireworks and the free tickets were good
reviews.text:
The location of the hotel was on the other side of sunset town from the night market. But it is v near kiss of the sea so we got to see beautiful fireworks every night we were there. 

Being boutique hotel, the room cleaniness and breakfast option was ok. 

Communication was challenging as we had to use google translate to communicate. 

There was supposed to be free shuttle around the area but due to communication difficulties we just paid for the buggy services around the area on our own. 

Overall still a very good place to stay and super worth it since they offered free cable car and Hon Thom theme park tickets.
reviews.response:
Dear Rebecca,  

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed review of your stay at Roma Phu Quoc Hotel. We are delighted that you enjoyed the beautiful nightly fireworks and appreciated the free cable car and Hon Thom theme park tickets, which added value to your experience.  

We regret to hear about the communication challenges you faced during your stay and the inconvenience caused regarding the shuttle services. Your feedback is invaluable, and we will work on improving communication to ensure a smoother experience for all our guests in the future.  

It’s great to know that, despite these challenges, you found our hotel to be a very good place to stay and super worth it. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for an even better experience in the future.  

Sincerely,  
Roma Phu Quoc Hotel Management Team

These are small things in the bigger picture and they can easily address them.

Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

Other than that, would recommend this stay- simly stunning.

reviews.title: Great Stay. Unfortunate facility leasing
reviews.text: Stay was great, staff were super friendly and everything was super clean. Breakfast was good. Location is super close walking to everything. Unfortunately when I booked the hotel earlier in 2025 they had a roof top pool and gym facilities which they lease from a different building. However when we arrived for our stay early in the new year their lease arrangement had changed so there was no longer a rooftop pool or gym. There was no communication of this change when booking or at arrival, until I inquired to the right person. Staff was lovely about it however it is just disappointing as I booked specially for those facilities.
reviews.response:
Dear Blake,

Thank you for sharing your detailed and honest feedback with us.
We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed our friendly staff, cleanliness, breakfast, and the convenient location close to many attractions.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the disappointment caused by the change in rooftop pool and gym facilities. We fully understand how important these amenities were to your booking decision, and we regret that the update was not communicated clearly in advance. Your feedback has been taken seriously and shared with our management team to help improve transparency and guest communication moving forward.

Thank you once again for staying with us, and we truly hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for an improved experience in the future.

Sincerely,
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: Good location within Sunset town
reviews.text:
Pros
Close to cable car station and kiss of the sea show 
Small breakfast but has bit of everything 
Free buggy ride to night market(beware,  night market is not regular night market. It is upscale version inside Sunset town) 
Free airport shuttle( not as frequent as you want though)

Cons
You need to give cash deposit of 1M at check in
You cannot bring in certain food from outside
Communication through google translate 
Apparently lots of people book ocean view and had firework and Sunset view but I had city view so obviously none of those charms of this hotel if you book city view. 

All in all, Roma hotel is nice and has good value but I wouldn't stay inside Sunset town next time if I ever come back to Phu Quoc again. Sunset town is filled with weird European looking buildings and monuments with premium price tags for food and drinks.
reviews.response:
Dear Keeng,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback about your stay at Roma Hotel Phu Quoc.

We are pleased to know that you appreciated our convenient location near the cable car station and the Kiss of the Sea show, as well as the complimentary buggy service and airport shuttle. Your comments regarding breakfast variety, communication, and the differences between city view and ocean view rooms are sincerely appreciated and have been shared with our team for further improvement.

We truly value your honest insights, as they help future guests choose the room type that best suits their expectations. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide an even more satisfying experience in the future.

Sincerely,
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: 部屋は可愛くて立地もいいけど大きな問題点あります。
reviews.positives: ロープウェイ乗り場から徒歩ですぐで、毎日開催する花火を見るには最高の立地ではあります。スタッフはみんな若くて親切でした。ナイトマーケットなどには無料で送迎がありました。
reviews.negatives: 予約した際ロープウェイとウォーターパーク施設、キッスオブザブリッジなどが無料とメールが来ましたが、チェックインした日には使えず翌日以降しか利用できないことがメールのやりとりで判明しました。そんな大事な事は先に伝えておくべきです。必ずしも連泊するとは限らないからです。そのことを知って事情をメールするも都合の悪いことには返事は来ませんでした。ブッキングドットコムのカスタマーサービスからも連絡を入れてもらいましたが、ホテル側からはメールの返事が来なかったそうです。なので日にちをずらして再予約したところ、3月はもうそのサービスをしていない。代わりに空港への無料送迎サービスをすると言われました。ロープウェイチケットは4000円します。空港送迎はgrabを呼んでも往復そんな金額はかかりませんし、一泊の値段とロープウェイチケット代合わせればコスパ的に高額です。近隣でも半額で泊まれるでしょう。ホテルで接客してくれたスタッフはみんな親切でしたが、きっとオーナーや責任者が無能なんだと思います。ホテル自体は可愛らしくて部屋からのビューも素敵でしたが、宿泊する前にメールのやりとりで都合の悪いことには返事をしないなんて、言葉が通じない国に行くのに、客側を不安にさせることだとわからないのでしょうか？スタッフ同士の報告、連絡、相談を徹底させて、またサービス内容も明確にするようにしないとこれからも同じトラブルが起こると思いますよ。予約する方は十分注意して下さい。

Also their swimming pool is located at other bulldings and I never get to try it which is a waste.

Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: フーコック南部を満喫
reviews.positives:
12月末に2泊しました。
事前に空港ピックアップをお願いしていたところ、WhatsAppでドライバーの方から直接連絡が届き、待ち合わせ場所と顔写真が送られてきました。
こちらは写真を送っておらず、ネームプレートやホテル名の看板などはお持ちでなかったので、少々手間取りましたが、無事に合流し、ホテルへお送りいただけました。
ただ、この時点で自分が現金を用意しておらず、ホテルで精算するものと思い込んでいたのですが、実際はドライバーさんへ直接支払う必要があったようで、到着時にまた少々手間取りました。
（ドライバーさんは、現金でなくともQRで支払い可能とおっしゃって、何度か試したのですが、私のスマホでは対応不可でした）
結局、ホテルの方が話をつけてくださったので、特にもめるようなことはなく、私がチェックアウト時に支払うことで解決しました。
また、この流れで現金引き出しのためにホテル近くの安全なATMまで送迎していただけることとなり、結果としてはこれ以降の旅行中（ホイアン・ダナン）にもこの際の現金を使えたので助かることになりました（街中のATMは壊れていたり手数料が高かったりカードが吸い込まれたりと問題が多く選ぶのが難しい）。
ホテルは小ぢんまりとしておりますが、スタッフは親切で、快適に過ごすことができました。
到着が早かったのでチェックアウト可能な14時までは併設のカフェでランチをとりましたが、ボリュームたっぷりのカニチャーハンとスムージー、おいしかったです。
全体的に、物価はホイアン・ダナンよりは高めですが、十分リーズナブルと感じる価格です。
立地はサンセットタウンの中ですので、ロープウェイ乗り場、キスブリッジ、ショー会場、どこも近く、徒歩で観光するにはとても便利でした。
中心部からすぐですが、騒がしいエリアからは少しだけ離れるので静かで、車も少なく歩きやすいです。
少し歩くとコンビニ的なお店もありました。
朝食会場は併設カフェで座席が少ないので、混む時間帯だと屋内は埋まっていましたが、外のテラス席（夜は花火を見物するにも良い場所です）も心地よい気候でしたので問題なく、目の前の海や頭上のロープウェイを眺めながらいただきました。
オムレツや麺類（メニューは日による）もお願いすれば作ってもらえます。
帰りは元々自分でGrabを予約していたので、ホテルの空港ドロップオフは不要とお伝えしていたのですが、当日にベトジェットエアの時間変更があり、
Grabをキャンセルし、そうなるとホテルのシャトルバスの時間が合いそうだったので、お伺いしたところ（本来であれば1日前に予約要）、空席があり無事に送っていただけました。
滞在中のホテルとのやりとりもWhatsAppで可能なので何かと便利です。
利用していませんが、ナイトマーケットやジャグジープール？への送迎もありました。
無料で開催される夕方のサンセットタウンツアー（1日2回、15時、16時から30-40分程度）には到着日に参加し、街の様子を全体的に見ることができ、あちこちで写真も撮っていただけてよかったです。
reviews.negatives: 2泊目の終わり頃にフロントスタッフに声をかけられ、チェックイン時にパスポートを確認していなかったのでWhatsAppで画像を送るよう言われたが、他のスタッフと情報共有されていなかった。

There was buggy service as well to bring you around. We even got complimentary cable car tickets which was an added point. Staffs were very helpful and accommodating. Keep up the good work !

Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: A Picture perfect Room
reviews.text:
Booked this 2 months ahead of travel - especially for an ocean view room. From the Hotel entrance till the room balcony everything is artistic. 
Paylayer option from Agoda is much useful.
This is just 400m from Hon Thom Cable car boarding station and to Kiss square, Sunset bazaar ,etc.
Hotel is providing a free Buggy service on request upto 3 PM and by 4PM /5PM there is a sunset town buggy tour done by hotel for which we need to register in advance.
Also after 6PM, they provide buggy shuttle service to and from Night market at 30min intervals.
Swimming pool is tied up with Loop jacuzzi which is 600m away and we need to make a request so that hotel will book for free on requested time.
Breakfast is Simple & superb with a Vietnamese soup everyday along with  other options. Airport transfer to and from  via SIC transfer is free on the specified timings based on advance request before 12hr. All the people in the hotel are nice and sweet - always with a pleasant smile and not showing faces.
reviews.response:

We’re also glad that the buggy services, including the Sunset Town tour and night market shuttle, added value to your stay. Your feedback regarding the swimming pool arrangement has been noted, and we truly appreciate you highlighting both the strengths and areas for clarity.

Thank you once again for choosing Roma Phu Quoc Hotel. We look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable family stay.

Sincerely,
Roma Phu Quoc Hotel Management Team

reviews.title: Highly Recommended Stay at Roma Hotel Phu Quoc!
reviews.text:
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc is a beautiful and scenic hotel that I highly recommend. The view from the balcony is absolutely cinematic. You can clearly see the fireworks, the cable car, the Kiss Bridge, and the ocean all in one breathtaking panorama!

The location is ideal, just a short walk to popular attractions like Kiss of the Sea and Sarah Halal Food, making it very convenient for Muslim travelers. The hotel is exceptionally clean and well-maintained.

1 of the best perks is the free shuttle service, which not only takes you to the best OOTD spots but also to the cable car station.

The staff are incredibly friendly and helpful. They even acted as photographers for us, and the photos turned out looking professional! Special thanks to the receptionist who allowed us to check in early at around 11 AM, even though the official check-in time is 2 PM.

A few things to note:
Breakfast is non-halal, but you can enjoy your own pre-packed meals at outside café area, where tables are available.
Outside food is not allowed in the rooms, and there’s a fine of 4 million VND if this rule is violated.
A deposit is required upon check-in. For our 3-night stay in 2 rooms, we paid RM450.

We recommend staying in Sunset Town rather than Grand World. The vibe in Sunset Town is much livelier and picturesque. The drive between the two takes about an hour.

Overall, Roma Hotel stands out in terms of hospitality and aesthetics compared to other hotels in the area. For souvenirs, we highly recommend shopping at KingKong Mart! —great selection and value!
reviews.response:
Dear Nur,

Thank you so much for your wonderful review and high rating!

We’re truly delighted that you enjoyed the scenic view from your room and appreciated the convenient location near Kiss of the Sea and Sarah Halal Food. It's great to know that our shuttle service and friendly staff added to your overall experience. Your kind words mean a lot to us, and we’re glad to have been part of your memorable family trip.

We look forward to welcoming you back in the future!

Sincerely,
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: WORTH EVERY PENNY!
reviews.text:
First time staying in this hotel, boy it was worth every penny!

The room was beautiful, clean, not to mention spacious. Definitely comfortable and totally felt like newly-built. 

And the service was STELLAR. Notable mention to Julia who was incredibly helpful and informative, from telling me about the shuttle to the Airport and Sunset Town, attractions in Phu Quoc and making sure that I have a ride upon the check out.  She even gave advice on how to save up some costs on these stuff! 

Kudos to her, who showed a true meaning of hospitality 👏💯

Definitely will recommend this hotel for those looking for affordable yet chic hotel located at the city center.
reviews.response:
Dear Denny,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a wonderful and detailed review of your recent stay with us at Roma Hotel Phu Quoc. We are truly delighted to know that your first experience exceeded your expectations and that you found the room spacious, clean, and beautifully designed—just as we strive for every guest to feel.

Your kind words about our service, especially your recognition of Julia, mean a great deal to us. We are proud to have her on our team, and we will be sure to pass along your praise. It’s heartening to know that her helpfulness and local knowledge enhanced your stay and made your trip more convenient and enjoyable.

We are also very grateful for your recommendation. It would be our pleasure to welcome you back anytime you return to Phu Quoc.

Sincerely,  
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff is very nice. They provided guidance carefully in various ways. The buggy shuttle service within the town was very helpful. I called via LINE, but since it's an app that's not commonly used, they didn't notice immediately, but when I called on LINE, they got back to me right away. The driver for the town tour was very good at taking pictures. Breakfast included made-to-order egg dishes or pho, while other items were served buffet-style. One downside is that the walls are thin, so the voices from the elevator hall are loud. The neighboring room checked out at 6 AM and was talking at the entrance, which woke me up. Also, starting room cleaning at 7 AM is a bit early. However, getting tickets for the cable car and water park at this price is a great deal, and I am very satisfied.
reviews.response:
親愛なる Aki様  

この度はRoma Hotel Phu Quocをご利用いただき、また詳細なレビューをお寄せいただきありがとうございます。  

スタッフの丁寧な案内やタウン内のバギー送迎サービスがお役に立てたと伺い、大変嬉しく思います。また、タウンツアーのドライバーが写真撮影でお手伝いできたことも、素晴らしい思い出となったことを願っています。朝食についての具体的なご意見もありがとうございます。  

一方で、壁の薄さによる騒音や早朝の清掃がご不快な思いをさせてしまい申し訳ございません。これらの点については、サービス改善のために真摯に受け止めてまいります。  

ケーブルカーとウォーターパークのチケット付きプランがお得で満足いただけたとのことで、とても光栄です。また次回も素晴らしい滞在を提供できるよう努力いたします。  

敬具  
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc マネジメントチーム

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 旅館位於日落小鎮，是歐式地中海風格建築，臨近纜車站及親吻橋，在面海房陽台即可觀賞晚上的水舞秀煙火。提供免費嘟嘟車接送到夜市及纜車站等景點。租摩托車一天15萬，價格比旁邊租車店低廉。每房價含兩位成人來回纜車及水上樂園及親吻橋門票。有配合的spa館，離峰時段可打九折。
reviews.negatives: 旅館規模較小，房間不大，早餐每人一小份套餐，很精簡。房價內含的纜車票需要前一天下午四點前確認，我們六點入住，只能訂後一天的票，打亂了原本規劃好的行程。旅館本身沒有泳池，但應是跟其他業者有合作的泳池，入住當天泳池在維修無法使用。

reviews.title: Book with an ocean view.
reviews.text: The main tourist attractions are within a 5-7 minute walk. The location is really great. Make sure to book a room with an ocean view. The buggy car tour and breakfast are included, making it a good value. You can communicate with the staff directly via KakaoTalk, and they offer airport pick-up and drop-off, and they're very friendly. The downside is that the bed is too firm. Those with back pain might find it a bit uncomfortable because of the bed. Everything was good, but my husband said he struggled because the bed was too hard. I was okay with it.

앞으로도 더 나은 서비스로 보답할 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다.

존경을 담아,
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc 운영팀

reviews.title: A hotel with high cost-performance ratio and attentive service.
reviews.text: Stayed for 4 days and 3 nights. The hotel staff were all attentive and polite, eager to assist. The hotel offers a shuttle car tour of Sunset Town, with the driver helping to take photos and being very courteous. The cable car route passes right outside the hotel window, and the terrace provides a clear view of the "Kiss of the Sea" fireworks display every night, which made me abandon the idea of buying tickets to watch it. The water pressure in the bathroom shower was sufficient, and the hot water was very stable. The breakfast was delicious, and there was something different each day, with the restaurant staff being very attentive. The only downside was that there was a bad smell in the toilet, which took some getting used to; the only solution was to close the toilet lid and door. The smell would decrease a bit. Additionally, a deposit of 500,000 is required each day, so it's necessary to prepare enough cash based on the length of stay at check-in.
reviews.response:
尊敬的 Yuk，

感謝您詳細且真誠的評價。我們很高興您喜歡酒店的位置、交通便利以及房間內欣賞煙火的體驗。

您的肯定對我們團隊而言意義重大，期待未來再次歡迎您蒞臨 Roma Hotel Phu Quoc。

此致敬禮，
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc 管理團隊

reviews.title: It was better than I expected, so I'm leaving a review.
reviews.text: I was worried because it was an affordable hotel without a swimming pool, but aside from the lack of a pool, it was truly excellent. First of all, the room was spacious and clean, and the room I booked had a really great view of the sea and fireworks, so just looking out the window from the room made me very happy. The location is great as it's right in the center of Sunset Town, next to the cable car station and the symphony performances. The breakfast will be delicious for those who enjoy spices. The atmosphere was good and the pho was unique, so I enjoyed it. The room was better than a resort in the 200,000 won range, and my child says they want to come back here again.

reviews.title: 95% wonderful
reviews.text:
My family and I had a pleasant stay at Roma, everything is clean, new and convenient with a spacious room facing the calm sea.  From the room, I enjoyed the fireworks at 9:30 every night from the little balcony, which was the first time I was able to see fireworks from such a close location. 

Two thingsI felt a bit discomfort are the unfriendly attitude of the lady at the front desk, who asked me what was for when I asked for the third key for my niece.

The hotel offers the free rides to and from it but with fixed schedules. I would recommend the hotel to consider flexible schedules for family guests of three people and more.
reviews.response:
Dear Chau,

Thank you very much for your detailed and thoughtful review!

We are delighted to know that you and your family had a pleasant stay, and that you enjoyed the clean and spacious room, beautiful sea view, and especially the fireworks from your balcony every night. Your kind words mean a lot to us and encourage our team greatly.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced regarding the third room key and the attitude at the front desk. We take your feedback seriously and will look into the matter to improve our service. Your suggestion about offering more flexible shuttle schedules for families is well noted and appreciated.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you and your loved ones back in the near future!

Sincerely,
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: The scenery is amazing!
reviews.text: I reserved a room with an ocean view and a balcony. The time I arrived at the airport was outside of the pickup hours. When I went outside, I found staff wearing polo shirts from the Roma Hotel! I hurried to catch up and spoke to them, and after making a call, they told me they would take me to the hotel. The polo shirt also had the name of the Venice Hotel printed on it, so they may have been picking up guests from there at that time. They kindly took me to the hotel. The room was clean, and the view was fantastic with the ocean right in front. I could even see fireworks from my room at night, which was great. For breakfast, they made pho and egg dishes to your liking. I’ve been to Vietnam several times, but this was the most delicious pho I’ve ever had. The night market and supermarket are within walking distance. I think it's a hotel where a woman traveling alone can stay safely. Since I go to Phu Quoc Island every year, I’m considering using it again next time.

reviews.title: City View
reviews.text: I stayed in a family room with a city view, but perhaps because it was on the first floor, I couldn't see the city and instead there was an artificial turf garden. I regretted not choosing a sea view. The fireworks were beautiful and visible just a few minutes away on foot. It was great that I was driven by buggy to Vietnam Select where I could buy souvenirs. The next day, I took the cable car and spent the whole day at Aquatopia. There were many types of slides, and there was a wooden coaster that the kids enjoyed riding multiple times. The cable car ticket included was a good deal. For breakfast, you could choose between pho or an omelet, plus there was a mini buffet, but if you didn't go early, there wasn't much variety left. It was delicious, so I wished I could have eaten more. The staff communicated using a translation device.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: The night of brilliant fireworks.
reviews.text:
This stay at Roma Hotel was overall very satisfying. The room was clean and tidy, the environment was comfortable, and it felt very relaxing to stay there.

The hotel's location is excellent, situated in the city center near Kiss Bridge, the snack street, and the pedestrian street, all within walking distance, making dining and entertainment very convenient. There are also many romantic restaurants nearby, perfect for couples or anniversary dinners.

Additionally, the hotel is very close to the cable car station and the beach, making travel very convenient. A special highlight is that the hotel also offers a free Sunset Town excursion and airport shuttle bus service, providing great value for money.

Overall, whether it’s the location, environment, or supporting services, everything was quite good, making it a highly recommended choice for accommodation on Phu Quoc Island. 👍
reviews.response:

感谢您给予我们满分评价！很高兴您对酒店的位置、设施以及整体入住体验感到满意。

期待再次欢迎您的光临！

此致敬礼，
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc 管理团队

reviews.title: Perfect location, I want to use it again.
reviews.text:
1. First of all, the location and view are the best: I booked a fourth-floor ocean view room, and the view is amazing. You can fully appreciate the beauty of the Vietnamese night sea. I watched the fireworks live at the venue, but you can also see it from the terrace. The cable car passes overhead, and the Kiss of the Sea performance venue is nearby, which is great.

2. Convenient services and friendly staff: After booking, they sent me a message for airport pickup and drop-off, and the responses to messages are quick. They offer free rides to your desired location, and you can choose to join a sunset tour at one of the three scheduled times each day. The front desk staff was the friendliest person I met in Phu Quoc!

3. Furthermore, the facilities are incredibly clean, and the breakfast pho was unique and delicious because it had tomatoes in it!

Since I had an early morning flight, I wanted to stay for an extra night, even if just for half a night, but they were fully booked, which was disappointing. I would love to visit again if I go to the south.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Tôi thật sự say mê Phú Quốc, đặc biệt là trải nghiệm lưu trú tại Roma Hotel, Sunset Town. Quang cảnh từ phòng thật tuyệt đẹp, phòng rộng rãi và thoải mái, và điều ấn tượng nhất chính là sự thân thiện, nhiệt tình của đội ngũ nhân viên.

Có một hôm trời mưa rất to, nhân viên khách sạn đã chủ động che ô cho chúng tôi – thật sự rất cảm động. Bất kể chúng tôi muốn đi đâu, dịch vụ đưa đón 24/7 của khách sạn luôn sẵn sàng và hoạt động rất tốt, nên không hề phải lo lắng.

Là người Hồi giáo, tôi vô cùng trân trọng sự quan tâm của họ. Nhân viên tự giải thích rõ món ăn nào halal và món nào không. Nếu còn băn khoăn, bánh mì và trứng luôn là lựa chọn an toàn.

Tóm lại, phòng sạch sẽ, quang cảnh đẹp và dịch vụ tận tâm đã khiến Roma Hotel trở nên thật đặc biệt. Nếu có thể chấm một triệu sao, tôi sẽ sẵn sàng dành tặng một triệu sao cho trải nghiệm lưu trú tuyệt vời này!

It warms our hearts to hear that our staff’s attentiveness, from offering an umbrella on a rainy day to explaining halal food options, made your visit more comfortable and memorable.

We are also glad that you enjoyed the breathtaking views, spacious rooms, and the convenience of our 24/7 shuttle service. Your kind words are a great source of encouragement for our team to continue delivering exceptional hospitality to all our guests.

It would be our honor to welcome you back for another stay filled with warmth, comfort, and unforgettable moments.

reviews.title: All good
reviews.text:
Review of Roma Hotel Phu Quoc: Fireworks can be seen from the room
Good price, good food, good service
Our stay at Roma Hotel Phu Quoc this time was not just a stay but felt like entering a chapter in a fairytale. It is a truly romantic and peaceful place, perfect for couples looking to escape the chaos and relax.
Atmosphere and Service
What impressed me the most was the genuinely warm and attentive service from the staff. Every smile and assistance made us feel like important guests of the hotel. From the moment we arrived until the day we had to leave, everything was smooth and full of sincerity.
Room and Breakfast
The room is a little paradise, clean and simply but tastefully decorated. The bed was soft and comfortable, like being embraced, and every area in the room was well taken care of in every detail.
The breakfast was another unique impression. It was not just good but felt like a morning feast full of variety. There were both delicious local Vietnamese dishes and carefully prepared international cuisine, all served with fresh fruit, helping us start the day feeling refreshed and satisfied.
Conclusion
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc is an excellent choice for couples looking for a clean, well-serviced retreat with an atmosphere infused with love in every corner. It is a memorable experience that is better than anything we've ever read in reviews before.

reviews.title: One of the hotel staff Willey was extremely helpful to both my wife and myself. His customer service skills were outstan
reviews.positives: Nice clean rooms, walking distance to most things
reviews.negatives:
The breakfast was below the normal standard most hotels offer, not much to choose from.
On observation every guest checking out was hit with a cleaning fee of 200VND to clean the towels. The reason wax said it can not be washed by hand. Now I would have thought a machine wash in hot water would be required for hygiene purposes. Not a hand wash. The photo I was shown there was no marks on the towels. This is a bad look for the hotel and it will definitely put guest off returning in the future.
As we had to wait for our van to the airport, every guest was hit with this fee which was a surprise to every guest checking out.
The give days prior it was never an issue, only the check out day. This was no coincidence, but a way of getting extra money from every guest. A bad customer service tactic at best.
If more money is required, I suggest just add it into the booking price to begin with. Most customers would be happy to pay it. But this makes every guest feel like they have done something wrong when in fact they have not. 
We enjoyed our stay but as like other guest, this tactic leaves a sour taste in the guest mouth.
We happily paid, but it was disappointing when we checked out.

reviews.negatives: The pool and gym wasn’t in the hotel but another apartment complex 500m away.

reviews.title: Warmest hotel at sunset town
reviews.text: so happy that I stayed here when I went to Phu Quoc. All the facilities, help and warmest staff there❤️ Hope that i can come back again.
reviews.response:
Dear Adelina,

Thank you so much for your heartwarming review.

We’re truly happy to hear that your stay at Roma Hotel Phu Quoc was a joyful experience. It’s wonderful to know that you appreciated our facilities and felt the warmth and support of our staff. Your kind words mean a lot to us.

We sincerely hope to welcome you back again in the future for another memorable visit.

Sincerely,  
Roma Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: Good location, clean, free TukTuk service around sunset town
reviews.text: Nice room, big, clean, breakfast is ok. Some problem happened like keycard was unable to use after we came back everyday, so we need to go down for reset again. Anyway, a bit annoying but we could let it go. We could see the fireworks from our balcony, so beautiful. Recommend ~
reviews.response:
Dear Pattarawadee,  

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our convenient location, clean and spacious rooms, and complimentary TukTuk service around Sunset Town. It’s wonderful to know that you had a chance to enjoy the beautiful fireworks from your balcony as well.  

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the keycard issue. We understand that this may have been frustrating, and we appreciate your patience. Your feedback is valuable, and we will work on improving this aspect to ensure a smoother experience for our guests in the future.  

We truly appreciate your recommendation and hope to welcome you back for another pleasant stay at Roma Phu Quoc Hotel.  

Sincerely,  
Roma Phu Quoc Hotel Management Team

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Location is very strategic. Walking distance to Ride cable car, Centre of town, Kiss of the bridge, Snorkeling and Sea walking Departure Terminal.

Staff is very helpful, they also provide buggy service, town tour and airport shuttle service.

Room is spacios. 

Breakfast is great also.

If u have extra time, can also try their jacuzzi pool, facing Kiss bridge. Very chill. 


Me, my husband and Kids love our stay here.
